title: Er Gen
content:
Er Gen
 (耳根) is a Chinese Web Novel writer whose real name is Liu Yong (刘勇; Liú Yǒng). 
Renegade Immortal
 is his flagship work.

Er Gen's Xianxia World

Interview translator's note:

"...there may be some small mistakes in the translation... The video contains some spoilers regarding the end of some of his novels. Major spoilers are left untranslated, some minor ones remain. Be warned, if you speak Chinese, you might want to turn the volume down during those parts if you wish to avoid the spoilers."
